##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=GaO(OH)
##LOCALITY=Tsumeb, Namibia
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=William W. Pinch
##DESCRIPTION=Pale green platy crystals, associated with galena and tennantite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R100125
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Powder, using Mo radiation
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 4.5122 b: 9.784 c: 2.9701 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 131.12 crystal system: orthorhombic
##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
